metadata.title:
ONO BLAMES


CITY COUNCIL

COMMUNICATIONS ON MONROE
ST. BRIDGE WERE UNHEED-
ED AND MAkESHiFT REPAIRS
WERE REGULARLY AUTHOR.
IZEn

pages.raw_text:
The west side of the newly re-
paired Monroe st. bridge was
thrown open to foot and wagon
traffic this morning. This side has
been completely refloored. When
the east side is refloored the whole
work will present a crowned cen
ter instead of the flat surface, as
before.


Regarding new bridge in COM
pliance with the authority given
the city by the voters last spring,
when they allowed a 100000 bond
issue for new bridges, Commission
er James T. ONO this morning
blamed the council for not getting
the work of construction on Mon
roe st. under way. He said:


81 sent several communications
which were not needed in the
least. Then l took several of the
councilmen to inspect the bridge
and told them that If work were
not to be started soon on a new
structure new flooring would be
necessary. They considered awhile
and then told me to 60 ahead with
the work OF reflooring. Just when
we will have new bridge here
do not know and will not attempt
to guess"


Mr.. ONO further stated that the
matter of new bridge was up to
the council and the board of works
had no authority in the matter UNI
til given 1t by the council
